input.command:
echo "=== launcher still up? ==="
ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print "  pid="$2" cpu="$3"%"}' || echo "  (launcher gone — need to reopen)"
echo
echo "=== window bounds + AX buttons on the launcher window ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then
          set {px, py} to position of w
          set {sw, sh} to size of w
          set out to "window '" & (name of w) & "' pos=" & px & "," & py & " size=" & sw & "x" & sh & linefeed
          try
            set btns to every button of w
            set out to out & "buttons: " & (count of btns) & linefeed
            repeat with b in btns
              try
                set out to out & "  btn: '" & (title of b as string) & "'" & linefeed
              end try
            end repeat
          on error errm
            set out to out & "no enumerable buttons: " & errm & linefeed
          end try
          return out
        end if
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return "no Homecoming window found"
end tell
AS
input.description: Inspect launcher window bounds and clickable buttons
